projects.name: Resyntha
projects.description: Multi-Agent Research Intelligence Platform automating literature review, multi-provider retrieval, knowledge extraction, and research landscape generation using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Groq.

projects.name: Atlas
projects.description: Production-grade RAG platform with OCR pipeline, pgvector semantic search, streaming citation-aware generation, and modular backend.

projects.name: Engineering Portfolio
projects.description: Full-stack portfolio with Engineering Handbook, AI assistant, LeetCode telemetry, and markdown content system using React, Vite, Express, and LLM APIs.

projects.name: SUMS - Smart University Management System
projects.description: Role-based academic and placement management system built with Express.js, PostgreSQL, and Node.js. Features BCNF-normalized schemas and RBAC.

projects.name: GitHub Project Analyzer
projects.description: Analytics dashboard that aggregates GitHub repository metadata and visualizes language usage and project statistics using Express.js and Chart.js.

philosophy.approach: Prefers building real production-quality systems over chasing buzzwords. Learning comes from hands-on debugging, iteration, and consistent practice.
